title: Tornado Alley (ProtoManly's Weather)
description: Tornado alley, with the use of ProtoManly's Weather
body:
A modpack that uses ProtoManly's Weather!
Mods used (not content heavy)!
- kogtyv-Towny and Village
  - adds city and town looking villages occasionally
- Particular Reforged + Subtle Effects
  - visual effects
- ProtoManly's Weather
  - tornados and weather
- Sodium and Iris
  - optimization/shader support
- Sound physics remastered
  - better sounds
- WI Zoom
  - zooming (V key)
- PMShaders
  - Shader support! Might make visual artifacts as it is not fully supported
- PMW Villagers Take Cover!
  - Villagers take cover from the tornado
- Elton's wind meter
  - Adds wind meters and turbines
- EAS Addon for Protomanly's Weather Mod
  - Adds an EAS system and damage reviewer
- PMW Radar Overhaul!
  - Overhauls the radars in the base mod
- Burnt Basic
  - Fire overhaul
- More PMW supported mods and QOL features
- Fixed terrain generation
- Vehicles such as Tornado Intercept and Immersive Aircraft
- More optimizations

Check out the creators of these mods!
